SEARCH
Package pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model

Class BaseException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ForbiddenException, GenericBusinessException, GenericDatabaseException, GenericRuntimeException, HttpException, InvalidCredentialsException, NotFoundException, TokenExpiredException, UnauthorizedException, ValidException, WebClientException
public abstract class BaseException extends RuntimeException
Base abstract class for all custom exceptions within the application.

This class uses reflection and a custom annotation (ExceptionDef) to automatically bind subclass instances to a specific catalog entry (BaseExceptionCatalog). It populates standard API error properties such as error codes, messages, and HTTP statuses.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Nested Classes

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    BaseException.Builder<E extends BaseException>
    Builder class for dynamically constructing instances of BaseException subclasses by overriding properties mapped in the default catalog.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseException

      protected BaseException()
      Protected constructor that initializes exception properties.

      If called via the Builder pattern, it injects properties defined by the builder. Otherwise, it uses reflection to read the default properties from the catalog mapped by the ExceptionDef annotation.

      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the ExceptionDef annotation is missing or misconfigured.

  • Method Details

    • getErrorCode

      public String getErrorCode()
      Retrieves the specific error code identifier.
      Returns:
      The string representing the error code.

    • getExceptionName

      public String getExceptionName()
      Retrieves the standardized exception name.
      Returns:
      The string representing the exception name.

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Retrieves the descriptive error message.
      Overrides:
      getMessage in class Throwable
      Returns:
      The error message string.

    • getStatus

      public int getStatus()
      Retrieves the HTTP status code.
      Returns:
      The integer HTTP status code.

    • getErrors

      public Map<String,String> getErrors()
      Retrieves any detailed structural errors or validation messages.
      Returns:
      A map of error fields and messages, or null if none exist.

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Retrieves the precise timestamp of when the exception occurred.
      Returns:
      The timestamp as a LocalDateTime.
